bullets: Pray for Christians in China whose worship spaces have been demolished, that God sustains displaced believers and their families with courage, peace, and enduring faith amid the ongoing crackdown reported by ChinaAid.

Lift up the injured survivors and grieving communities in India affected by the armed ambush that killed three church leaders returning from a peace conference, asking God to bring healing, reconciliation, and protection to all tribal communities involved.

Ask God to bring swift justice and lasting security to Christian communities and schools in Nigeria after a teacher was beheaded and children were kidnapped in coordinated attacks, and pray for the safe return of all remaining hostages.

Pray for Ukrainian civilians suffering under the largest aerial assault of the war, including families who have lost children and loved ones, and for aid workers whose supplies were destroyed in strikes.
Lift up the roughly 30,000 displaced people in Haiti who have fled gang violence and now face homelessness and deepening hunger, asking God to provide safety, shelter, and food.

Pray for civilians in Lebanon caught in ongoing airstrikes, for the more than 1.6 million people displaced, for grieving families, and for the brave first responders who risk their lives to help the wounded.
Ask God for wisdom and restraint among leaders in Iran and Israel, and for the protection of civilians in both nations as diplomatic efforts continue amid the threat of renewed military conflict.
Pray for the thousands of protesters in Bolivia — farmers, miners, teachers, and indigenous community members — that their economic grievances are heard peacefully and that calm is restored.
Lift up Muslim communities across the United States grieving after a deadly hate attack at a mosque, asking God to bring healing, justice, and an end to religiously motivated violence.
Pray for families in Pakistan affected by gender-based violence, that the justice system protects women and girls and that safety and dignity are upheld for all.
Ask God to bring peaceful resolution to Kenya's transport workers' strike, to comfort the families of those killed in protests, and to secure fair economic conditions for ordinary workers.
Pray for the thousands of families in the Philippines who lost loved ones in the drug war, that truth comes to light, justice is served, and the nation finds healing.
Lift up workers and leaders in South Korea navigating a major labor dispute, asking God for fair negotiations and for the livelihoods of tens of thousands of families to be protected.
Pray for the families of the 25 people killed in southern China's floods, and for those evacuated from their homes as authorities assess the full extent of the destruction.
Ask God for calm and safety for communities across southern Iran who felt the shallow magnitude-5 earthquake, trusting that no injuries or damage will be reported.

Lift up the residents of southeastern Turkey shaken by a magnitude-5.6 earthquake, especially the 74 people who sought medical care and those still carrying trauma from previous disasters in the region.
Pray for communities across Vanuatu as repeated earthquakes continue to affect the island nation, asking God for protection, resilience, and the absence of serious damage.
Ask God to watch over coastal communities near the islands of Indonesia affected by recent seismic activity, keeping residents safe from harm and minimizing any damage.
